zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud DeClare Countess of Belvoir於大約1134年出生在英國艾可蕾托 登莫福時，她的父親Robert de Clare56歲，母親Matilda de Senlis45歲。她和Lord William De Albini至少有1個女兒。她去世於1174年在英國英格蘭享年41歲。

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud DeClare Countess of Belvoir was born about 1134, in Little Dunmow, Essex, England, her father, Robert de Clare, was 56 and her mother, Matilda de Senlis, was 45. She had at least 1 daughter with Lord William De Albini. She died in 1174, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud DeClare Countess of Belvoir est née environ 1134, à Little Dunmow, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Clare, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Matilda de Senlis, avait 45 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Lord William De Albini. Elle est décédée en 1174, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 41 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Maud DeClare Countess of Belvoir(이)가 대략 1134년 영국 에세스 리틀 던모에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Clare(은)는 56세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda de Senlis(은)는 45세였다. 그녀는 Lord William De Albini(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1174년 영국 잉글랜드에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.
